title: 2026 Agentic Coding Trends Report
why_candidate: Directly targeted research report on agentic coding trends; full-length PDF with structured analysis and case studies; high relevance to our document type.
strengths: Good structural model for a trends report
weaknesses: PDF text extraction may be partial without OCR

title: A new era of intelligence with Gemini 3
why_candidate: Product + trends narrative from a leading platform provider that explicitly frames agentic coding, agentic development platform (Antigravity), and developer tooling; strong for product/feature framing and vendor positioning.
strengths: Good examples and claims and timeline
weaknesses: Less neutral analysis than an independent report

title: OpenAI API — Pricing and Agents guides
why_candidate: Contains concrete pricing tables for models and agentic tools (Codex, tool calls, containers) which we must cite for cost breakdowns; strong source for cost data.
strengths: Model-level token costs, tool call and container costs
weaknesses: Focused on OpenAI's stack; not a trends analysis report

title: The agentic reality check: Preparing for a silicon-based workforce
why_candidate: Independent industry analysis about agentic AI and organizational implications; useful for market trends, adoption rates, and risks framing.

title: AI Engineering Trends in 2025: Agents, MCP and Vibe Coding
why_candidate: Technical-community-oriented article synthesizing developer-facing trends (agents, MCP, vibe coding); good for developer UX and tooling practice examples.
weaknesses: Not a formal report; journalistic tone
